message:
fix: add .nojekyll to bypass Jekyll processing for GitHub Pages

GitHub Pages builds were failing ("Page build failed") because Jekyll
was trying to process the 925KB session transcript HTML file. The file
contains Liquid-like syntax ({{ and {%) in code blocks that Jekyll
interprets as template directives, causing build errors.

The .nojekyll file tells GitHub Pages to serve files directly without
Jekyll processing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
